title: Longest Common Subsequence
hints: Compare characters from both strings — if they match, both pointers advance
If characters differ, try skipping one character from either string and take the better result
Build a 2D table where dp[i][j] = LCS length for text1[0..i-1] and text2[0..j-1]
Space can be optimized to O(min(m, n)) by keeping only the previous row
